title: Syracuse Police get sweet revenge against the Fire Department in charity basketball showdown (photos)
summary: Syracuse Police and Fire departments competed in the second annual 'Bravest vs. Finest' charity basketball game to benefit the United Way of Central New York. The event represents interagency collaboration and community engagement, with the Police Department securing victory.

entity_refs.name: United Way of Central New York

political_signal.description: Interagency cooperation and community engagement through charity event demonstrates cohesion between emergency services departments and alignment with charitable mission.
